query:
INSERT INTO knowledge_base (
  compound_name,
  category,
  summary,
  mechanisms,
  clinical_evidence,
  dosing,
  contraindications,
  interactions,
  sources,
  tags,
  created_by
) VALUES (
  'Cinnamic Acid',
  'PPAR-gamma Agonist',
  'Cinnamic acid and its naturally occurring derivatives are partial PPAR-gamma agonists (selective PPAR-gamma modulators/SPPARMs) that provide therapeutic benefits with potentially fewer side effects than full agonists like thiazolidinediones. They improve insulin sensitivity, reduce inflammation, and modulate adipogenesis through direct receptor activation and indirect anti-inflammatory pathways.',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Direct PPAR-gamma Binding', 'description', 'Cinnamic acid derivatives fit into the ligand-binding pocket of PPAR-gamma receptor, causing conformational changes that recruit co-activator proteins and release co-repressor proteins. The activated receptor forms a complex with RXR and binds to PPAR Response Elements (PPREs) to initiate transcription of genes involved in adipogenesis, insulin sensitivity, and lipid metabolism.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'NF-κB Inhibition', 'description', 'PPAR-gamma activation trans-represses Nuclear Factor-kappa B (NF-κB), a master switch for inflammation. Physical interaction between activated PPAR-gamma and NF-κB prevents activation of pro-inflammatory genes (TNF-alpha, IL-6, iNOS), reducing chronic low-grade inflammation associated with insulin resistance.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Insulin Sensitization', 'description', 'Promotes glucose uptake in fat and muscle cells by increasing expression of GLUT4 and other insulin-responsive genes, improving the body''s response to insulin and lowering blood sugar levels.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Adipogenesis Regulation', 'description', 'Unlike full TZD agonists which cause excessive weight gain, partial agonism leads to balanced fat tissue remodeling by promoting formation of small, insulin-sensitive adipocytes without excessive new fat cell creation.')
  ),
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('finding', 'Improved insulin sensitivity in diabetic animal models with lower fasting blood glucose and improved glucose tolerance', 'source', 'Multiple preclinical studies'),
    JSON_OBJECT('finding', 'Reduction in inflammatory markers (TNF-alpha, IL-6, iNOS) through NF-κB suppression', 'source', 'Anti-inflammatory mechanism studies'),
    JSON_OBJECT('finding', 'Ferulic acid (derivative) activates PPAR-gamma and improves insulin sensitivity in clinical observations', 'source', 'Rice bran, oats, and coffee studies'),
    JSON_OBJECT('finding', 'p-Coumaric acid demonstrates anti-diabetic and antioxidant effects mediated by PPAR-gamma', 'source', 'Peanuts, tomatoes, carrots research'),
    JSON_OBJECT('finding', 'Caffeic Acid Phenethyl Ester (CAPE) shows potent PPAR-gamma activation with strong anti-inflammatory and insulin-sensitizing properties', 'source', 'Coffee component research')
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'typical', 'Varies by derivative - typically consumed through dietary sources',
    'range', 'Ferulic acid: 50-500mg/day; p-Coumaric acid: dietary intake; Caffeic acid: through coffee consumption',
    'notes', 'Natural derivatives are often more potent than cinnamic acid itself. Bioavailability and optimal therapeutic dosing require further clinical research.'
  ),
  JSON_ARRAY(
    'Known hypersensitivity to cinnamic acid or derivatives',
    'Severe hepatic impairment (metabolic concerns)',
    'Pregnancy and lactation (insufficient safety data)'
  ),
  JSON_ARRAY(
    'May potentiate effects of anti-diabetic medications (monitor blood glucose)',
    'Potential interaction with anticoagulants due to phenolic structure',
    'May interact with medications metabolized by cytochrome P450 enzymes'
  ),
  JSON_ARRAY(
    'https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/ (PPAR-gamma agonist studies)',
    'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/ (Ferulic acid insulin sensitivity)',
    'https://www.sciencedirect.com/ (Cinnamic acid derivatives metabolic effects)'
  ),
  JSON_ARRAY(
    'PPAR-gamma',
    'Insulin Sensitivity',
    'Anti-inflammatory',
    'Metabolic Syndrome',
    'Type 2 Diabetes',
    'Natural Compounds',
    'Ferulic Acid',
    'Caffeic Acid',
    'p-Coumaric Acid',
    'Adipogenesis',
    'NF-kB Inhibition'
  ),
  1
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DkbYAaF6MBWwK.96fd8e3f3a28 --database 6XDPcfqtDX3GCRKvFSNyjg --execute INSERT INTO knowledge_base (

  JSON_ARRAY(
